DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF STEPHEN KIGHTLINGER'S MOTION TO MODIFY THE SUBPOENAS OF DEFENDANTS MARION FELDMAN AND PHILIP BARRY FELDMAN IS DENIED. THE COURT CONSIDERS THIS MOTION TO BE A MOTION TO QUASH. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE REQUIREMENT OF A SEPARATE STATEMENT, CRC 3.1345. ON THE MERITS, DEFENDANTS AGREE TO LIMIT THE MEDICAL SUBPOENAS TO THE BODY PARTS PLAINTIFF CLAIMS WERE INJURED IN THE ACCIDENT. THE COLLATERAL SOURCE RULE DOES NOT PROHIBIT DISCOVERY OF THE REQUESTED RECORDS. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Modify The Subpoena Of Deft'S Marion Feldman And Philip Barry Feldman Seeking Pltf'S Employment Records
Off Calendar Dec-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF STEPHEN KIGHTLINGER'S Motion To Modify The Subpoena Of Defendants Marion Feldman And Philip Barry Feldman Seeking Plaintiff's Employment Records. Granted in part. The subpoenas for employment records shall be limited to income/wage and attendance records for the five years preceding the accident to the present. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.). Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported. =(302/CWW)

Notice And Motion To Modify The Subpoenas Of Defts Marion Feldman And Philip Barry Feldman
Off Calendar Nov-10-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF STEPHEN KIGHTLINGER'S MOTION TO MODIFY THE SUBPOENAS OF DEFENDANTS MARION FELDMAN AND PHILIP BARRY FELDMAN.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. THE COURT CONSIDERS THIS MOTION TO BE A MOTION TO QUASH. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE REQUIREMENT OF A SEPARATE STATEMENT, CRC 3.1345. ON THE MERITS, DEFENDANTS AGREE TO LIMIT THE MEDICAL SUBPOENAS TO THE BODY PARTS PLAINTIFF CLAIMS WERE INJURED IN THE ACCIDENT. THE COLLATERAL SOURCE RULE DOES NOT PROHIBIT DISCOVERY OF THE REQUESTED RECORDS. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

payments.description: REQ OR STIP AND ORDER W/O HEARING
